fields.comment: Absolutely beautiful roses! They lasted for over a week and the color was vibrant. Perfect for anniversary gift.
Very good quality flowers. Delivery was on time. Would recommend.
Stunning arrangement! My wife loved it. The roses were fresh and well packed.
Excellent service and beautiful flowers. Will order again!
Good quality roses. Slightly pricey but worth it for special occasions.
Perfect condition on arrival. Flowers lasted 8 days! Highly recommended.
Good flowers but delivery was a bit late. Otherwise okay.
Amazing fragrance and beautiful presentation. Great gift choice!
